hypothesis: If the six-step ML-guided workflow accurately predicts thermodynamically stable metal hydride lattices under high pressure by learning the mapping from lattice and electronic features to Ehull, then a subset of the screened candidates will exhibit negative formation enthalpy, high hydrogen content with strong interstitial electron localization and 3D electronic connectivity, and nonzero superconducting transition temperatures as validated by high-throughput DFT and electron-phonon coupling calculations.
